mapper.select: SELECT id, code, display_name, source_filename, is_active, include_in_wincc_poll, created_at, updated_at FROM telemetry_watchlist_bundle ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, code, display_name, source_filename, is_active, include_in_wincc_poll, created_at, updated_at FROM telemetry_watchlist_bundle WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO telemetry_watchlist_bundle (code, display_name, source_filename, is_active, include_in_wincc_poll) VALUES (#{code}, #{displayName}, #{sourceFilename}, #{isActive}, #{includeInWinccPoll})
mapper.update: UPDATE telemetry_watchlist_bundle SET display_name = #{displayName}, source_filename = #{sourceFilename}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE telemetry_watchlist_bundle SET display_name = #{displayName}, source_filename = #{sourceFilename}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE code = #{code}
UPDATE telemetry_watchlist_bundle SET is_active = CASE WHEN code = #{code} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
UPDATE telemetry_watchlist_bundle SET include_in_wincc_poll = #{includeInWinccPoll}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE code = #{code}
